---
title: "Methodology"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _pages-nav.qmd >}}

## Methodology

### What this vignette computes

This vignette tracks the health and growth of the knowledge base at `~/docs_gh/llm/knowledge/` — measuring wiki page count, raw source count, provenance coverage (fraction of pages with `## Sources` sections), AI-inferred claim density, and topic-graph connectivity from `[[link]]` cross-references. It reads time-series snapshots from `~/.claude/logs/knowledge/*.parquet` via DuckDB when available, falling back to live `list.files()` counts from `knowledge/wiki/` and `knowledge/raw/` when no snapshots exist.

### Data sources

- `inst/extdata/vignettes/vig_kb_stats.rds`: pre-computed aggregate stats from the `vig_kb_stats` targets pipeline target, committed to the repository; read first in all environments including CI (where `knowledge/` is gitignored); page word counts are anonymized (`page_001`, `page_002`, …) to avoid leaking file paths
- `inst/extdata/vignettes/vig_kb_graph.rds`: pre-computed topic-graph adjacency data — nodes (id, domain, inbound-link count, orphan/broken flags) and edges (from, to) extracted from `[[link]]` cross-references in `knowledge/wiki/*.md` by [`vignettes/_kb_topic_graph.R`](https://github.com/JohnGavin/llm/blob/main/vignettes/_kb_topic_graph.R#L1); committed so the Topic Graph tab renders in CI without accessing the gitignored `knowledge/` directory
- `~/.claude/logs/knowledge/*.parquet`: daily snapshots produced by `~/.claude/scripts/knowledge_pulse.sh`; each row is one metric for one category (wiki/raw/quality) at one snapshot date; used when available locally for richer time-series charts
- Live fallback: `list.files()` on `knowledge/wiki/` and `knowledge/raw/` directories — used only when both the RDS and parquet paths are unavailable; provenance percentage computed by scanning each wiki file for `^## Sources` and `AI-inferred` patterns

### AI disclosure

This vignette was developed with assistance from Anthropic's Claude (model: Opus 4.7 and Sonnet 4.6). AI helped with code structure, prose drafting, and visualization choices. All analytical decisions and data interpretations are the author's responsibility.

{{< include /_includes/build-info.qmd >}}

{{< include /_includes/qr-footer.qmd >}}
